bio.text1: Yida Tsai is a multidisciplinary designer based in Taipei, working between visual design and digital experience. His practice spans from interface design to printed matter, exploring how ideas take form across different mediums.
bio.text2: With a foundation in visual communication and experience in both digital and editorial projects, he focuses on clarity, structure, and the translation of design into tangible outcomes.
bio.tagline: Visual Designer based in Taipei. Focused on Typography & Editorial Design.

items.title: Interface Design
items.desc: UI / UX design, layout systems, and interaction flow.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Frontend implementation with modern frameworks and responsive systems.

items.title: Brand & Visual Design
items.desc: Identity systems, typography, and visual language.

items.title: Editorial & Print
items.desc: Publication design, printed materials, and physical outputs.

items.title: Creative Direction
items.desc: Concept development, visual strategy, and cross-medium execution.

cards.title: Digital Experience Practice.
cards.desc: Continuously exploring the intersection of visual design and front-end development, creating interfaces that balance clarity, interaction, and aesthetics.

cards.title: Transition into front-end development.
cards.desc: Shifted from visual design to web development, building a solid foundation in modern technologies and translating design thinking into functional interfaces.

cards.title: Campmate — Bridging UI and system logic.
cards.desc: Led the design and implementation of key features including homepage, coupon system, and admin tools, connecting user experience with backend functionality.

cards.title: Visual design in practice.
cards.desc: Worked as a visual designer across branding and marketing projects, focusing on typography, layout, and delivering clear visual communication.

cards.title: NTUA — Visual Communication Design
cards.desc: Studied at National Taiwan University of Arts, building a foundation in visual language, design principles, and creative thinking.

approach.title: Design Approach
approach.body1:
Each project begins with a visual idea,
shaped through typography, structure, and material.
approach.body2:
By balancing aesthetics and logic,
the work evolves into a clear and
meaningful visual experience.

field.tagline: Visual Designer based in Taipei. Focused on Typography & Editorial Design.
field.taglineSub: Bridging visual language and digital experiences.

vision.subtitle: Where aesthetics, logic and experience converge

right.title: Structured Emotion
body: It is shaped through structure, and brought

descriptions.1:
Every project begins with a clear idea.
Concept defines the direction, intention,
and the story behind the design.
descriptions.2:
Structure shapes the foundation of design.
It organizes elements and builds a visual
framework that supports the concept.
descriptions.3:
Material brings texture and depth.
Through surface, light, and detail,
the design gains its physical presence.
descriptions.4:
Detail refines the final expression.
Small elements complete the design
and reveal the true level of craftsmanship.
